Gary Doman • ARC ecosystem

Awesome ARC Plugins

A curated ARC-first plugin registry and landing page for the full deterministic operator stack: ARC Core, Lucid Terminal, LuciferAI_Local, Synth Shell, and the broader research/runtime surfaces around them.

Featured stack

Featured Stack
ARC Core

Kernel authority layer for receipts, event schema, state tree, branch engine, replay, rollback, and proof-backed execution.
Featured Stack
Lucid Terminal

Deterministic operator interface for routing commands, visualizing runtime state, and enforcing authority-gated execution.
Featured Stack
LuciferAI_Local

Local reasoning and proposal layer designed for offline workflows, controlled execution, and future ARC-integrated persistent agent loops.
Featured Stack
Synth Shell

Visualization and embodiment layer for rendering ARC state, branches, and operator-facing system cognition surfaces.

Installable plugins

ARC Stack

Installable
ARC Operator Stack

Umbrella Codex plugin bundle for Gary Doman's ARC stack: deterministic boot, receipts, branch-aware execution, Lucid Terminal routing, and LuciferAI_Local integration.

Repository Manifest

Featured Stack

ARC Core

Kernel authority layer for receipts, event schema, state tree, branch engine, replay, rollback, and proof-backed execution.

Lucid Terminal

Synth Shell

Visualization and embodiment layer for rendering ARC state, branches, and operator-facing system cognition surfaces.

Research Stack

Installable
ARC Turbo OS

Seed-rooted, branch-aware runtime concept focused on reusable computation graphs and jump-to-resolved-output execution.

Repository Manifest
Installable
Proto-Synth Grid Engine

Virtual simulated physics capacity-weighted engine and wetware communications grid concept within the broader ARC ecosystem.

Repository Manifest
Installable
Seeded Universe Recreation Engine

Seed-based universe reconstruction project focused on deterministic physics, causal evolution, and replayable simulation states.

Repository Manifest

Utility Stack

Installable
Arc-RAR

Portable archive and transport layer concept for moving ARC-ready packages and runtime payloads across systems.

Repository Manifest
